---
title: "Christian Bernhard von Tauchnitz, Baron von Tauchnitz"
---

## Christian Bernhard von Tauchnitz, Baron von Tauchnitz

**Dates:** (1816-1895)

### Description

publisher of English books in Leipzig

### Biography

A letter of 1893 survives from his [[person:2124]son] to CMY, but her correspondence with Firma Tauchnitz must have dated from much earlier.

### Letters

- Letter from  the 2d of June,  1893
- Letter from Sept 30th 1880
- Letter from Oct 12th 1867
- Letter from May 10. 1865.
- Letter from May 9th [1865]
- Letter from Feb 8 1865
- Letter from Febry 7th 1865
- Letter from Novr 22d 1864
- Letter from Febry 5th [1864]
- Letter from June 5th 1860
- Letter from March 16th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
